definition: Opinions given by customers about a product or service

thaiTranslation: ความคิดเห็นของลูกค้า

definition: A comment left by a customer about a product
exampleSentence: She read online reviews before buying the phone.

definition: A score showing customer satisfaction, usually out of five

definition: Details explaining what a product is and does

exampleSentence: The shop offers try before you buy for shoes.

definition: A document outlining a company's goals and strategy
exampleSentence: She wrote a business plan before opening the shop.

definition: Official permission to operate a business

definition: A business project undertaken by two or more companies

definition: A plan for how a company makes money

laoTranslation: ສັນຍາເຊົ່າ

exampleSentence: The tenant runs a small cafe in the building.

definition: A bill for services like electricity or water

definition: The total amount paid to employees

definition: Work done independently for multiple clients

exampleSentence: The consulting fee covered a full day of work.

thaiTranslation: ค่าที่ปรึกษา

exampleSentence: The lawyer requires a monthly retainer.

definition: A contract detailing services to be provided
exampleSentence: They signed a service agreement for maintenance.

definition: A document requesting goods from a supplier

definition: A unique code identifying a bill

exampleSentence: Read the terms and conditions before signing up.

definition: Detailed conditions often printed in tiny text
exampleSentence: Check the small print before buying insurance.

definition: Funds that cannot be accessed or used

definition: A target related to money management

definition: A person's usual pattern of spending money

definition: A person's usual pattern of saving money

definition: The process of budgeting, saving, and spending wisely

definition: The practice of sticking to a budget
exampleSentence: Financial discipline helped her pay off debt.

definition: Spending more money than planned or available

exampleSentence: She is frugal and rarely buys new clothes.
Thrifty shoppers compare prices before buying.
His extravagant lifestyle drained his savings.

definition: Extremely careful with small amounts of money
exampleSentence: Penny-pinching habits helped them save for the trip.

definition: An economy where transactions mainly use physical money
exampleSentence: Rural areas still rely on a cash economy.

definition: An economic system based on exchanging goods directly

definition: A coin-like object used instead of money for a specific purpose
exampleSentence: Use a token to ride the amusement park rides.

definition: A digital currency secured by cryptography
exampleSentence: Cryptocurrency trading is still uncommon here.
laoTranslation: ເງິນຄຣິບໂຕ
thaiTranslation: สกุลเงินดิจิทัล

definition: Money that exists only in electronic form
exampleSentence: Digital currency is gaining attention worldwide.

definition: A stable currency widely accepted internationally
exampleSentence: Traders prefer payment in hard currency.

definition: A person who sells goods in small quantities

definition: A seller operating outside formal business regulations
exampleSentence: Informal traders fill the roadside market.

definition: A market located near a national border
exampleSentence: The border market sells goods from both countries.

definition: A shop selling goods without import tax, usually at airports
exampleSentence: We browsed the duty-free shop before boarding.

definition: Official permission to conduct business trade
exampleSentence: The shop owner renewed her trade license.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດການຄ້າ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตประกอบการค้า

definition: A tax paid by companies on their earnings
exampleSentence: Business tax funds local infrastructure projects.
laoTranslation: ພາສີທຸລະກິດ

definition: The process of gathering government income, mainly taxes
exampleSentence: Revenue collection improved with the new system.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບລາຍໄດ້

exampleSentence: Informal lending is common in rural villages.

definition: A person who lends money, often at high interest

definition: A community group that pools members' savings
exampleSentence: The savings group helps members access small loans.

definition: A group where members take turns receiving pooled funds

definition: Money collected and managed by a local group
exampleSentence: The community fund paid for the new well.

definition: A farmer who grows crops mainly to sell

definition: Money saved outside a bank, often at home
exampleSentence: Informal savings are common where banks are scarce.
laoTranslation: ການອອມນອກລະບົບ

definition: A person who sends money to family abroad
exampleSentence: The remittance sender works overseas to support her family.
laoTranslation: ຜູ້ສົ່ງເງິນໂອນ

definition: A person who receives money sent from abroad
exampleSentence: The remittance receiver used the funds for school fees.

definition: A local system where members save together
exampleSentence: The community savings scheme funded a new well.

definition: An organization owned by members for shared financial services
exampleSentence: The financial cooperative offers low-interest loans to farmers.

definition: A very small loan, often for starting a business
exampleSentence: A micro-loan helped her open a small shop.

exampleSentence: I awake at six.
We feared what might befall us.
We delayed the trip.
We reach the end.
We extend the deadline.
We inaugurate the new building.
The meeting lasts an hour.
The introduction precedes the text.
We almost missed the bus.
She always arrives early.
We meet annually.
We spoke briefly.
The machine runs constantly.
thaiTranslation: อย่างต่อเนื่อง

exampleSentence: We exercise daily.
We eventually succeeded.
We finally arrived.

exampleSentence: The multinational corporation built a factory here.

definition: The joining of two companies into one
exampleSentence: The merger created a larger company.

exampleSentence: Outsourcing reduced production costs.

definition: The point where supply equals demand
exampleSentence: The market reached equilibrium at a lower price.

exampleSentence: Unemployment is a key economic indicator.

definition: The recording and analysis of financial transactions
exampleSentence: She studied accounting at college.

definition: A financial statement showing assets and liabilities
exampleSentence: The balance sheet showed strong growth.

definition: A financial report showing profit and loss
exampleSentence: The income statement revealed a small profit.

exampleSentence: The cash flow statement showed steady income.

definition: A formal record of financial activities
exampleSentence: Investors reviewed the company's financial statement.

definition: A simplified representation of economic processes

definition: An economic theory focused on production
exampleSentence: Supply-side economics favors lower taxes.

definition: An economic theory favoring government spending
exampleSentence: Keynesian economics supports stimulus spending.

definition: Government spending to boost the economy
exampleSentence: The economic stimulus created new jobs.

exampleSentence: Price control kept rice affordable.

exampleSentence: Investors were confident during the bull market.

definition: An investment fund using higher-risk strategies

definition: A fund pooling money from many investors
exampleSentence: She invests monthly in a mutual fund.

definition: Property consisting of land and buildings
exampleSentence: Real estate prices rose in the capital.

definition: The buying and selling of land and buildings
exampleSentence: The property market cooled after the tax change.

definition: Gradually paying off a debt over time

exampleSentence: The company's solvency was questioned by investors.

definition: Investing with high risk hoping for large gains

definition: A person who takes financial risks for profit

definition: A prediction about future economic conditions

definition: The expected direction of the economy
exampleSentence: The economic outlook improved this quarter.

exampleSentence: An economic upturn brought new investment.

definition: The difference between exports and imports
exampleSentence: The trade balance improved with new exports.

definition: A record of a country's trade and income with the world

definition: A record of a country's investment flows
exampleSentence: The capital account tracks foreign investment.

definition: The total income earned by a country's residents
exampleSentence: National income grew steadily this decade.

definition: How income is shared among a population

exampleSentence: Many workers rely on the informal economy.

definition: Economic activity that is officially recognized and taxed

exampleSentence: The black economy avoids paying taxes.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດເຖື່ອນ

definition: Changes made to improve an economic system

definition: Transferring government-owned business to private ownership

definition: A sudden change in demand for goods
exampleSentence: The pandemic caused a major demand shock.

definition: Trade restrictions imposed for political reasons

definition: A group of countries trading with few restrictions

definition: A group of countries with shared trade policies

definition: Government strategy to develop certain industries

definition: Developing multiple industries to reduce risk

definition: The steps involved in producing and delivering a product

definition: A measure of a company's financial performance
exampleSentence: Economic value added helps assess profitability.

definition: The value of the next best alternative given up

definition: How resources are distributed among uses

definition: The ability to produce something more efficiently than others
exampleSentence: The country has a comparative advantage in rice production.

definition: Cost savings gained by increasing production

definition: When a market does not allocate resources efficiently
exampleSentence: Pollution is an example of market failure.

definition: A cost or benefit affecting third parties

definition: A good available to everyone, like clean air
exampleSentence: Public goods are often provided by the government.
laoTranslation: ສິນຄ້າສາທາລະນະ

definition: Total spending on new capital before depreciation
exampleSentence: Gross investment in infrastructure rose this year.

thaiTranslation: การลงทุนรวม

exampleSentence: Net investment shows real capital growth.
laoTranslation: ການລົງທຶນສຸດທິ
thaiTranslation: การลงทุนสุทธิ

definition: The building up of capital assets in an economy
exampleSentence: Capital formation supports long-term growth.
laoTranslation: ການສະສົມທຶນ
thaiTranslation: การสะสมทุน

definition: The skills and knowledge of a workforce
exampleSentence: Education builds valuable human capital.

definition: Networks and relationships that benefit society
exampleSentence: Community trust is a form of social capital.
laoTranslation: ທຶນທາງສັງຄົມ
thaiTranslation: ทุนทางสังคม

definition: A method comparing currencies based on cost of living
exampleSentence: Purchasing power parity adjusts for price differences.

exampleSentence: Economic sanctions relief boosted trade this year.

definition: An increase in output within a specific industry

definition: The part of the economy providing services rather than goods
exampleSentence: The service sector employs most urban workers.

definition: The part of the economy involving farming
exampleSentence: The agricultural sector remains vital to rural income.

thaiTranslation: ภาคเกษตรกรรม

definition: The part of the economy involving manufacturing
exampleSentence: The industrial sector expanded with new factories.
laoTranslation: ຂະແໜງອຸດສາຫະກຳ
thaiTranslation: ภาคอุตสาหกรรม

definition: The part of the economy providing services
exampleSentence: Banking is part of the tertiary sector.
laoTranslation: ຂະແໜງຕະຕິຍະພູມ
thaiTranslation: ภาคตติยภูมิ

definition: The manufacturing part of the economy
exampleSentence: Textile production belongs to the secondary sector.
laoTranslation: ຂະແໜງທຸດຕິຍະພູມ
thaiTranslation: ภาคทุติยภูมิ

definition: The part of the economy involving raw materials
exampleSentence: Farming and mining belong to the primary sector.
laoTranslation: ຂະແໜງຕົ້ນປະຖົມ
thaiTranslation: ภาคปฐมภูมิ

definition: An economy based on information and skills
exampleSentence: The country is shifting toward a knowledge economy.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດຖານຄວາມຮູ້

definition: Economic activity based on digital technologies
exampleSentence: The digital economy has created new jobs.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດດິຈິຕອລ

definition: An economy based on short-term, flexible jobs
exampleSentence: Many young people work in the gig economy.

definition: An economy based on shared access to goods and services
exampleSentence: Ride-sharing apps are part of the sharing economy.

definition: An economic system focused on reuse and recycling
exampleSentence: The circular economy reduces waste and resource use.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດໝູນວຽນ

definition: An economy focused on sustainability and low carbon use
exampleSentence: The green economy created jobs in solar energy.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດສີຂຽວ
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐกิจสีเขียว

definition: Economic activity related to oceans and water resources
exampleSentence: Fishing and shipping are part of the blue economy.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດສີຟ້າ

definition: Economic growth driven mainly by exports
exampleSentence: Export-led growth transformed the country's economy.

definition: Producing goods locally instead of importing them
exampleSentence: Import substitution reduced reliance on foreign goods.

definition: The development of industries in an economy
exampleSentence: Rapid industrialization changed the city's skyline.
laoTranslation: ການພັດທະນາອຸດສາຫະກຳ

definition: The decline of industrial activity in an economy
exampleSentence: Deindustrialization led to factory closures.
laoTranslation: ການຫລຸດຖອຍອຸດສາຫະກຳ
thaiTranslation: การถดถอยของภาคอุตสาหกรรม

definition: The movement of people from the countryside to cities
exampleSentence: Rural-urban migration changed the city's population.
laoTranslation: ການເຄື່ອນຍ້າຍຈາກຊົນນະບົດສູ່ຕົວເມືອງ
thaiTranslation: การย้ายถิ่นจากชนบทสู่เมือง

definition: An economy relying heavily on money sent from abroad
exampleSentence: The remittance economy supports many rural families.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດອີງເງິນສົ່ງກັບ
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐกิจที่พึ่งพาเงินโอนกลับ

definition: A country or business involved in trade
exampleSentence: China is a major trade partner.

definition: A group of countries with shared trade agreements
exampleSentence: The trading bloc reduced tariffs between members.
laoTranslation: ກຸ່ມການຄ້າ
thaiTranslation: กลุ่มการค้า

definition: A trade deal between countries in a region
exampleSentence: The regional trade agreement boosted cross-border commerce.
laoTranslation: ສັນຍາການຄ້າພາກພື້ນ
thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงการค้าภูมิภาค

exampleSentence: Bilateral trade between the two nations grew steadily.
laoTranslation: ການຄ້າທະວິພາຄີ
thaiTranslation: การค้าทวิภาคี

definition: Trade involving many countries at once
exampleSentence: Multilateral trade agreements set global trade rules.
laoTranslation: ການຄ້າຫລາຍຝ່າຍ
thaiTranslation: การค้าพหุภาคี

definition: An international body regulating global trade
exampleSentence: The dispute was brought to the World Trade Organization.
laoTranslation: ອົງການການຄ້າໂລກ
thaiTranslation: องค์การการค้าโลก

definition: An international institution providing loans for development
exampleSentence: The World Bank funded the new water project.
laoTranslation: ທະນາຄານໂລກ

definition: An organization that promotes global monetary cooperation
exampleSentence: The International Monetary Fund provided emergency loans.
laoTranslation: ອົງການກອງທຶນການເງິນສາກົນ
thaiTranslation: กองทุนการเงินระหว่างประเทศ

definition: A bank that funds economic development projects
exampleSentence: The development bank financed the new highway.
laoTranslation: ທະນາຄານພັດທະນາ
thaiTranslation: ธนาคารเพื่อการพัฒนา

definition: Financial or material help given by one country to another
exampleSentence: Foreign aid supported the rebuilding effort.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອຈາກຕ່າງປະເທດ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือจากต่างประเทศ

definition: Support given to help a country's economy grow
exampleSentence: Development assistance funded rural schools.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອດ້ານພັດທະນາ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือเพื่อการพัฒนา

definition: Financial support to strengthen an economy
exampleSentence: Economic assistance helped stabilize the currency.
laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫລືອທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Conditions attached to an international loan
exampleSentence: Loan conditionality required economic reforms.
laoTranslation: ເງື່ອນໄຂເງິນກູ້
thaiTranslation: เงื่อนไขเงินกู้

definition: Economic reforms required as a condition for loans
exampleSentence: Structural adjustment programs reduced government spending.
laoTranslation: ການປັບໂຄງສ້າງ
thaiTranslation: การปรับโครงสร้าง

definition: Reliance of one economy on another
exampleSentence: Economic dependency on a single export is risky.
laoTranslation: ການເພິ່ງພາທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การพึ่งพาทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Economic problems linked to abundant natural resources
exampleSentence: The resource curse affected countries rich in oil.
laoTranslation: ຄຳສາບຊັບພະຍາກອນ
thaiTranslation: คำสาปทรัพยากร

definition: Economic harm caused by a booming resource sector
exampleSentence: Dutch disease weakened the country's manufacturing.
laoTranslation: ພະຍາດເສດຖະກິດແບບໂຮນລັງ

definition: The process of generating economic worth
exampleSentence: Innovation drives value creation in business.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງມູນຄ່າ
thaiTranslation: การสร้างมูลค่า

definition: The worth of a good or service in monetary terms
exampleSentence: The economic value of tourism grew significantly.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The inherent worth of something, not based on price
exampleSentence: Some argue nature has intrinsic value beyond economics.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າແທ້ຈິງ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าที่แท้จริง

definition: The price something would sell for in the market
exampleSentence: The market value of the land doubled.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າຕະຫລາດ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าตลาด

definition: The value of an asset as recorded in accounts
exampleSentence: The equipment's book value decreased each year.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າຕາມບັນຊີ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าตามบัญชี

definition: An asset that loses value over time
exampleSentence: A car is a depreciating asset.
laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນທີ່ມູນຄ່າຫລຸດລົງ
thaiTranslation: สินทรัพย์ที่มูลค่าลดลง

definition: An asset that gains value over time
exampleSentence: Land is often an appreciating asset.
laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນທີ່ມູນຄ່າເພີ່ມຂຶ້ນ
thaiTranslation: สินทรัพย์ที่มูลค่าเพิ่มขึ้น

definition: Understanding how to manage money effectively
exampleSentence: Financial literacy programs teach budgeting skills.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຮູ້ທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: ความรู้ทางการเงิน

definition: The management of an individual's money
exampleSentence: Personal finance courses help students save wisely.
laoTranslation: ການເງິນສ່ວນບຸກຄົນ
thaiTranslation: การเงินส่วนบุคคล

definition: The management of a family's money and expenses
exampleSentence: Household finance includes rent, food, and savings.
laoTranslation: ການເງິນຄົວເຮືອນ
thaiTranslation: การเงินครัวเรือน

definition: Organizing finances to meet future goals
exampleSentence: Financial planning helps prepare for retirement.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนทางการเงิน

definition: Preparing financially for life after work
exampleSentence: Retirement planning should start early.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນກ່ອນກະສຽນອາຍຸ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนเกษียณ

definition: Planning how assets will be distributed after death
exampleSentence: Estate planning ensures assets go to the right people.
laoTranslation: ການວາງແຜນມູນມໍລະດົກ
thaiTranslation: การวางแผนมรดก

definition: Money or property received from someone who has died
exampleSentence: She used her inheritance to start a business.
laoTranslation: ມູນມໍລະດົກ

definition: Assets held and managed for a beneficiary
exampleSentence: The trust fund pays for her education.
laoTranslation: ກອງທຶນທະຣັດ

definition: The lasting economic effects of past decisions
exampleSentence: The dam's economic legacy includes cheap electricity.
laoTranslation: ມູນເຊື້ອທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: มรดกทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Increasing people's financial independence and opportunity
exampleSentence: Microloans support women's economic empowerment.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງອຳນາດທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การเสริมพลังทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Access to affordable financial services for everyone
exampleSentence: Mobile banking has improved financial inclusion.
laoTranslation: ການເຂົ້າເຖິງບໍລິການທາງການເງິນ
thaiTranslation: การเข้าถึงบริการทางการเงิน

definition: People without access to formal banking services
exampleSentence: Mobile money reached the unbanked population.
laoTranslation: ປະຊາກອນທີ່ບໍ່ມີບັນຊີທະນາຄານ
thaiTranslation: ประชากรที่ไม่มีบัญชีธนาคาร

definition: Creating simplified representations of economic behavior
exampleSentence: Economic model building helps predict policy outcomes.
laoTranslation: ການສ້າງແບບຈຳລອງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การสร้างแบบจำลองเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A method examining relationships between economic sectors
exampleSentence: Input-output analysis shows how industries depend on each other.
laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະປັດໄຈການຜະລິດ-ຜົນຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์ปัจจัยนำเข้า-ผลผลิต

definition: A measure of how demand responds to price changes
exampleSentence: Rice has low price elasticity because it's a staple.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่น

definition: How much demand changes when price changes
exampleSentence: High price elasticity means demand drops sharply if prices rise.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນຂອງລາຄາ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นของราคา

definition: A graph showing the relationship between price and demand
exampleSentence: The demand curve slopes downward as prices fall.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນອຸປະສົງ
thaiTranslation: เส้นอุปสงค์

definition: A graph showing the relationship between price and supply
exampleSentence: The supply curve shifted after new farms opened.
laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນອຸປະທານ
thaiTranslation: เส้นอุปทาน

definition: The price where supply equals demand
exampleSentence: The equilibrium price stabilized after the harvest.
laoTranslation: ລາຄາດຸ່ນດ່ຽງ
thaiTranslation: ราคาดุลยภาพ

exampleSentence: The price ceiling kept rice affordable during the shortage.
The price floor protected farmers from falling prices.
thaiTranslation: ราคาขั้นต่ำ

definition: The overall benefit gained by buyers and sellers
exampleSentence: Economic surplus increased with the new trade deal.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The benefit consumers gain from paying less than they would
exampleSentence: Lower prices increased consumer surplus.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນຜູ້ບໍລິໂພກ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินผู้บริโภค

definition: The benefit producers gain from selling above their cost
exampleSentence: Higher prices increased producer surplus for farmers.
laoTranslation: ສ່ວນເກີນຜູ້ຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ส่วนเกินผู้ผลิต

definition: Lost economic efficiency due to market distortion
exampleSentence: The tax created a deadweight loss in the market.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียส่วนเกินทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: An interference that prevents efficient market outcomes
exampleSentence: Subsidies can cause market distortion.
laoTranslation: ການບິດເບືອນຕະຫລາດ
thaiTranslation: การบิดเบือนตลาด

definition: Payment beyond what is needed to keep a resource in use
exampleSentence: Landowners near the city earn high economic rent.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າເຊົ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ค่าเช่าทางเศรษฐศาสตร์

definition: Resources used to produce goods and services
exampleSentence: Land, labor, and capital are factors of production.
laoTranslation: ປັດໄຈການຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ปัจจัยการผลิต

definition: A relationship between inputs and output in production
exampleSentence: The production function shows how output changes with labor.
laoTranslation: ໜ້າທີ່ການຜະລິດ
thaiTranslation: ฟังก์ชันการผลิต

definition: Output produced per unit of labor
exampleSentence: New machines boosted labor productivity on the farm.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບແຮງງານ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพแรงงาน

definition: A measure of overall efficiency in production
exampleSentence: Total factor productivity improved with better technology.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບລວມປັດໄຈ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพปัจจัยรวม

definition: Cost savings from producing multiple related products
exampleSentence: Economies of scope let the factory make several goods cheaply.
laoTranslation: ການປະຫຍັດຈາກຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: การประหยัดจากขอบข่าย

definition: A company controlling multiple stages of production
exampleSentence: Vertical integration let the company control farming and processing.
laoTranslation: ການລວມຕົວແນວຕັ້ງ
thaiTranslation: การรวมกิจการแนวตั้ง

definition: A company combining with competitors at the same stage
exampleSentence: Horizontal integration reduced competition in the market.
laoTranslation: ການລວມຕົວແນວນອນ
thaiTranslation: การรวมกิจการแนวนอน

definition: The degree to which few firms dominate a market
exampleSentence: High economic concentration can reduce competition.
laoTranslation: ການລວມສູນທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การกระจุกตัวทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A market dominated by a few large firms
exampleSentence: The airline industry is often an oligopoly.
laoTranslation: ຕະຫລາດຜູ້ຂາຍໜ້ອຍລາຍ
thaiTranslation: ตลาดผู้ขายน้อยราย

definition: A group of firms that agree to control prices
exampleSentence: The cartel controlled oil prices for years.
laoTranslation: ກຸ່ມຮ່ວມມືຄວບຄຸມລາຄາ
thaiTranslation: กลุ่มพันธมิตรทางการค้า

definition: An illegal agreement to set prices
exampleSentence: The companies were fined for price fixing.
laoTranslation: ການກຳນົດລາຄາຮ່ວມກັນ
thaiTranslation: การกำหนดราคาร่วมกัน

exampleSentence: Antitrust law blocked the proposed merger.
laoTranslation: ກົດໝາຍຕ້ານການຜູກຂາດ
thaiTranslation: กฎหมายป้องกันการผูกขาด

definition: Laws and policies defending buyers' rights
exampleSentence: Consumer protection laws prevent false advertising.
laoTranslation: ການປົກປ້ອງຜູ້ບໍລິໂພກ
thaiTranslation: การคุ้มครองผู้บริโภค

definition: The degree of freedom individuals have in economic choices
exampleSentence: Economic freedom indexes rank countries by market openness.
laoTranslation: ເສລີພາບທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: เสรีภาพทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Favoring minimal government intervention in the economy
exampleSentence: Laissez-faire policy reduced business regulation.
laoTranslation: ນະໂຍບາຍປ່ອຍໃຫ້ຕະຫລາດເສລີ
thaiTranslation: นโยบายปล่อยเสรี

definition: A business owned and operated by the government
exampleSentence: The state-owned enterprise controls electricity production.
laoTranslation: ວິສາຫະກິດຂອງລັດ
thaiTranslation: รัฐวิสาหกิจ

definition: A project jointly run by government and private business
exampleSentence: The road was built through a public-private partnership.
laoTranslation: ການຮ່ວມມືລັດ-ເອກະຊົນ
thaiTranslation: ความร่วมมือรัฐ-เอกชน

definition: Spending on roads, bridges, and public systems
exampleSentence: Infrastructure investment improved trade routes.
laoTranslation: ການລົງທຶນພື້ນຖານໂຄງລ່າງ
thaiTranslation: การลงทุนโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

exampleSentence: Capital expenditure funded the new factory.
laoTranslation: ລາຍຈ່າຍລົງທຶນ
thaiTranslation: รายจ่ายลงทุน

definition: The cost of running day-to-day business
exampleSentence: Rent and wages are common operating expenses.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າໃຊ້ຈ່າຍໃນການດຳເນີນງານ
thaiTranslation: ค่าใช้จ่ายในการดำเนินงาน

definition: Ongoing business expenses not tied to production
exampleSentence: Overhead costs include rent and utilities.
laoTranslation: ຄ່າໃຊ້ຈ່າຍປະຈຳ
thaiTranslation: ค่าใช้จ่ายส่วนกลาง

definition: The point where revenue equals costs
exampleSentence: The shop reached its break-even point after six months.
laoTranslation: ຈຸດຄຸ້ມທຶນ
thaiTranslation: จุดคุ้มทุน

definition: The percentage of revenue kept as profit
exampleSentence: The company improved its profit margin this year.

definition: A measure of profit relative to investment cost
exampleSentence: The project offered a strong return on investment.
laoTranslation: ຜົນຕອບແທນຈາກການລົງທຶນ
thaiTranslation: ผลตอบแทนจากการลงทุน

definition: A major shift in how an economy functions
exampleSentence: Economic transformation followed the opening of new markets.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນແປງທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การเปลี่ยนแปลงทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The process of an economy returning to growth
exampleSentence: Economic recovery followed the end of the drought.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຕົວທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นตัวทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: An economy's ability to withstand shocks
exampleSentence: Diversified industries improve economic resilience.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມທົນທານທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: Financial difficulty experienced by people or a region
exampleSentence: The flood caused economic hardship for many families.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຫຍຸ້ງຍາກທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ความยากลำบากทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A chance to improve one's financial situation
exampleSentence: The new factory created economic opportunity in the area.
laoTranslation: ໂອກາດທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: โอกาสทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The capacity for future economic growth
exampleSentence: The region has strong economic potential in tourism.
laoTranslation: ສັກກະຍະພາບທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: ศักยภาพทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: The value added to an economy by an activity
exampleSentence: Tourism makes a large economic contribution to the country.
laoTranslation: ການປະກອບສ່ວນທາງເສດຖະກິດ
thaiTranslation: การมีส่วนร่วมทางเศรษฐกิจ

definition: A connection between different parts of an economy
exampleSentence: Strong economic linkages exist between farming and food processing.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມເຊື່ອມໂຍງທາງເສດຖະກິດ

definition: Harm to crops or plants caused by frost

laoTranslation: ຄວາມເສຍຫາຍຈາກນ້ຳຄ້າງແຂງ
thaiTranslation: ความเสียหายจากน้ำค้างแข็ง

definition: The likelihood of skin damage from sun exposure
exampleSentence: The sunburn risk is high at midday in the tropics.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມສ່ຽງຜິວໜັງໄໝ້ແດດ
thaiTranslation: ความเสี่ยงผิวไหม้แดด

definition: Physical strain caused by excessive heat
exampleSentence: Farm workers face heat stress during the dry season.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມກົດດັນຈາກຄວາມຮ້ອນ
thaiTranslation: ความเครียดจากความร้อน

definition: Physical strain caused by excessive cold
exampleSentence: Livestock can suffer cold stress in winter.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມກົດດັນຈາກຄວາມໜາວ
thaiTranslation: ความเครียดจากความหนาวเย็น

exampleSentence: Warm air currents rise from the heated ground.
thaiTranslation: กระแสอากาศ

definition: The movement of heat through rising and sinking air or fluid
exampleSentence: Convection drives the formation of thunderstorms.
laoTranslation: ການພາຄວາມຮ້ອນ
thaiTranslation: การพาความร้อน

exampleSentence: Birds ride the updraft to gain height.
laoTranslation: ກະແສອາກາດຂຶ້ນ
thaiTranslation: กระแสอากาศไหลขึ้น

exampleSentence: A downdraft can precede a strong storm.
laoTranslation: ກະແສອາກາດຈົມລົງ
thaiTranslation: กระแสอากาศไหลลง

exampleSentence: The plane hit turbulence during the storm.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມປັ່ນປ່ວນ
thaiTranslation: ความปั่นป่วนของอากาศ

definition: A change in wind speed or direction with height
exampleSentence: Wind shear can be dangerous for aircraft.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນທິດແຮງລົມ

definition: A wind that flows downhill due to cold, dense air
exampleSentence: Katabatic winds sweep down from the mountains at night.
laoTranslation: ລົມກາຕາບາຕິກ
thaiTranslation: ลมกาตาบาติก

definition: A cool wind blowing from the sea toward land
exampleSentence: The sea breeze cooled the coastal town in the afternoon.

definition: A wind blowing from land toward the sea, usually at night
exampleSentence: Fishermen use the land breeze to sail out at dawn.

definition: A warm, dry wind descending a mountain
exampleSentence: The foehn wind quickly melted the remaining snow.

definition: A warm wind that can rapidly raise temperatures
exampleSentence: The chinook wind raised temperatures by ten degrees in an hour.

definition: A low-pressure zone associated with monsoon rains
exampleSentence: The monsoon trough brought days of steady rain.
laoTranslation: ຮ່ອງມໍລະສຸມ

definition: A band near the equator where trade winds meet
exampleSentence: The intertropical convergence zone shifts with the seasons.
laoTranslation: ເຂດເຊື່ອມຕໍ່ອາກາດເຂດຮ້ອນ
thaiTranslation: เขตบรรจบระหว่างเขตร้อน

definition: A factor that influences climate patterns
exampleSentence: Ocean temperature is a major climate driver.
laoTranslation: ປັດໄຈຂັບເຄື່ອນພູມອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: ปัจจัยขับเคลื่อนภูมิอากาศ

definition: A link between weather patterns in distant regions
exampleSentence: Scientists study teleconnections between ocean and rainfall patterns.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມເຊື່ອມໂຍງທາງໄກ
thaiTranslation: การเชื่อมโยงทางไกล

definition: A narrow band of moisture-rich air causing heavy rain
exampleSentence: An atmospheric river brought record rainfall to the coast.
laoTranslation: ແມ່ນ້ຳບັນຍາກາດ
thaiTranslation: แม่น้ำในบรรยากาศ

definition: A storm formed by rising warm air
exampleSentence: Convective storms are common on hot afternoons.
laoTranslation: ພະຍຸແບບພາຄວາມຮ້ອນ
thaiTranslation: พายุจากการพาความร้อน

exampleSentence: The supercell produced large hail.
laoTranslation: ພະຍຸໝູນຂະໜາດໃຫຍ່
thaiTranslation: พายุซูเปอร์เซลล์

definition: A single flash of lightning hitting the ground
exampleSentence: A lightning strike started a small fire.
A sudden thunderclap startled the children.
laoTranslation: ສຽງຟ້າຮ້ອງດັງ
thaiTranslation: เสียงฟ้าร้องดัง

exampleSentence: The rainstorm lasted through the night.
The snowstorm closed the mountain roads.

definition: A severe snowstorm with strong winds
exampleSentence: The blizzard buried the town in snow.

definition: A mix of rain and snow
exampleSentence: Sleet made the roads slippery.
laoTranslation: ຝົນປົນຫິມະ

definition: Rain that freezes on contact with cold surfaces
exampleSentence: Freezing rain coated the trees in ice.
thaiTranslation: ฝนเยือกแข็ง

definition: Layers of snow accumulated over a season
exampleSentence: The mountain snowpack feeds rivers in spring.
laoTranslation: ຊັ້ນຫິມະສະສົມ
thaiTranslation: ชั้นหิมะสะสม

exampleSentence: Snowmelt fills the rivers each spring.
laoTranslation: ນ້ຳຫິມະລະລາຍ
thaiTranslation: น้ำจากหิมะละลาย

definition: A map dividing the world into climate regions
exampleSentence: The climate zone map shows the tropics in red.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ເຂດພູມອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่เขตภูมิอากาศ

definition: A system for classifying the world's climates
exampleSentence: The Koppen classification places Laos in the tropical zone.

definition: A climate with very little rainfall
exampleSentence: The desert climate sees almost no rain for months.

thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศแบบทะเลทราย

definition: A climate with mild, wet winters and dry summers
exampleSentence: The Mediterranean climate suits olive growing.

definition: A climate with large seasonal temperature differences
exampleSentence: The continental climate brings cold winters and hot summers.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດແບບພາຄພື້ນ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศแบบภาคพื้นทวีป

definition: A climate influenced by nearby oceans, with mild temperatures
exampleSentence: The maritime climate keeps coastal winters mild.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດແບບທະເລ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศแบบทะเล

definition: A climate found at high elevations, generally cooler
exampleSentence: The highland climate makes coffee growing possible here.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດເຂດພູສູງ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศที่สูง

definition: A climate with distinct wet and dry seasons
exampleSentence: The savanna climate supports grassland and scattered trees.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດແບບສະຫວັນນາ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศแบบสะวันนา

definition: A hot, wet climate with rain throughout the year
exampleSentence: The rainforest climate supports incredible biodiversity.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດປ່າຝົນ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศแบบป่าฝน

definition: An area where one climate type gradually changes to another
exampleSentence: The climate transition zone has features of both regions.

thaiTranslation: เขตเปลี่ยนผ่านภูมิอากาศ

definition: A daily record of weather observations
exampleSentence: The farmer kept a weather diary for years.
laoTranslation: ບັນທຶກອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: สมุดบันทึกอากาศ

definition: A written record of weather conditions
exampleSentence: The ship's weather log noted the storm's path.
laoTranslation: ບັນທຶກອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: บันทึกสภาพอากาศ

definition: The amount of water vapor present in the air
exampleSentence: Atmospheric moisture increases before a storm.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຊຸ່ມໃນບັນຍາກາດ
thaiTranslation: ความชื้นในบรรยากาศ

definition: Water in its gaseous form in the air
exampleSentence: Water vapor condenses to form clouds.

definition: The point at which air holds the maximum moisture
exampleSentence: Once air reaches its saturation point, rain begins to form.
laoTranslation: ຈຸດອີ່ມຕົວ
thaiTranslation: จุดอิ่มตัว

definition: The amount of moisture in air compared to its maximum capacity
exampleSentence: Relative humidity was above ninety percent this morning.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມຊຸ່ມສຳພັດ
thaiTranslation: ความชื้นสัมพัทธ์

definition: A plan to adjust to the effects of climate change
exampleSentence: The village adopted a climate adaptation strategy for flooding.

thaiTranslation: กลยุทธ์การปรับตัวต่อภูมิอากาศ

definition: The ability to withstand and recover from weather events
exampleSentence: Stronger buildings improve weather resilience.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມທົນທານຕໍ່ອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นต่อสภาพอากาศ

definition: A structure built to protect people during severe storms
exampleSentence: Residents took cover in the storm shelter.
laoTranslation: ບ່ອນຫລົບໄພພະຍຸ

definition: Making a structure resistant to weather damage
exampleSentence: Weather-proofing the roof prevented leaks during the storm.

definition: A computer model used to predict weather
exampleSentence: The weather forecasting model predicted heavy rain by Friday.

thaiTranslation: แบบจำลองพยากรณ์อากาศ

definition: Using mathematical models to forecast weather
exampleSentence: Numerical weather prediction improves forecast accuracy.

definition: A forecast made from multiple model runs

definition: How reliable a weather prediction turns out to be
exampleSentence: Forecast accuracy has improved with better satellites.

definition: The degree of unpredictability in a forecast
exampleSentence: Weather uncertainty increases beyond a week ahead.

definition: The likelihood that rain will occur
exampleSentence: The probability of rain tomorrow is seventy percent.

exampleSentence: There's a chance of showers this afternoon.
laoTranslation: ໂອກາດຝົນຕົກ
thaiTranslation: โอกาสฝนตกปรอยๆ

definition: A general prediction of future weather
exampleSentence: The weekly weather outlook looks mostly sunny.

definition: A prediction of climate trends over months or seasons
exampleSentence: The seasonal climate outlook favors a wetter monsoon.

definition: A measurement used to assess drought severity
exampleSentence: The drought index reached its highest level in a decade.

definition: A map showing areas prone to flooding
exampleSentence: The flood risk map guided where new houses could be built.

definition: An area at risk of flooding

definition: Planning to reduce flood damage in low-lying areas

definition: A raised bank built to prevent flooding
exampleSentence: The levee held back the rising river.
laoTranslation: ຄັນກັ້ນນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: คันกั้นน้ำ

definition: A wall built to prevent flooding from the sea or river
exampleSentence: The dike protects the lowland fields from the tide.
laoTranslation: ຄັນກັ້ນນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: เขื่อนกั้นน้ำ

definition: A wall built to protect the coast from the sea
exampleSentence: The seawall reduced damage from the storm surge.

definition: The wearing away of coastline by wave action

definition: The loss of sand and land along a beach

laoTranslation: ນ້ຳຂຶ້ນສູງສຸດ
thaiTranslation: น้ำขึ้นสูงสุด

definition: The combination of storm surge and normal tide
exampleSentence: The storm tide reached record heights.
laoTranslation: ນ້ຳຂຶ້ນຈາກພະຍຸ
thaiTranslation: น้ำขึ้นจากพายุ

definition: The capacity to withstand periods without rain
exampleSentence: Drought-resistant crops improve drought resilience.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມທົນທານຕໍ່ໄພແລ້ງ
thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นต่อภัยแล้ง

definition: A situation where water demand exceeds supply

definition: The amount of water needed for crops
exampleSentence: Irrigation demand rises sharply during droughts.

definition: Funding directed toward climate adaptation and mitigation

definition: A bond used to fund environmentally friendly projects
exampleSentence: The government issued a green bond for solar power.

definition: Money set aside for climate-related projects
exampleSentence: The climate fund financed new flood defenses.
laoTranslation: ກອງທຶນພູມອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: กองทุนภูมิอากาศ

definition: Money used to help communities adjust to climate change
exampleSentence: The adaptation fund supported drought-resistant farming.
laoTranslation: ກອງທຶນປັບຕົວ
thaiTranslation: กองทุนการปรับตัว

definition: Harm caused by climate change that cannot be avoided
exampleSentence: The conference discussed loss and damage compensation.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍ ແລະ ຄວາມເສຍຫາຍ

definition: Discussions between countries about climate policy

laoTranslation: ການເຈລະຈາດ້ານພູມອາກາດ

definition: A goal for reducing greenhouse gas output

definition: A balance between emissions produced and removed

definition: Measuring and tracking greenhouse gas emissions
exampleSentence: Carbon accounting helps companies track their impact.
laoTranslation: ການບັນຊີຄາບອນ

definition: A public commitment to climate action
exampleSentence: The nation made a climate pledge at the summit.

definition: The process of reducing carbon emissions
exampleSentence: Decarbonization of the power grid is underway.
laoTranslation: ການຫລຸດຄາບອນ

definition: The shift from fossil fuels to cleaner energy
exampleSentence: The energy transition includes more solar and wind power.
laoTranslation: ການຫລົດປ່ຽນພະລັງງານ

definition: The shift toward using less-polluting energy sources

exampleSentence: Climate diplomacy led to new emissions agreements.
laoTranslation: ການທູດດ້ານພູມອາກາດ
thaiTranslation: การทูตด้านภูมิอากาศ

definition: A business heavily affected by weather conditions
exampleSentence: Farming is a weather-dependent industry.

definition: Income that depends on the time of year

laoTranslation: ການດຳລົງຊີບຕາມລະດູການ

definition: An industry strongly affected by climate change
exampleSentence: Tourism is a climate-sensitive sector.

definition: An observable event in the atmosphere
exampleSentence: Rainbows are a beautiful weather phenomenon.

definition: A visual effect caused by light in the atmosphere
exampleSentence: A halo around the moon is an optical phenomenon.

definition: An arc of colors caused by sunlight and rain

definition: A decrease in the number of trees in an area
exampleSentence: Tree loss along the river increased flooding.
laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การสูญเสียต้นไม้

definition: An increase in forest area, often through planting
exampleSentence: Forest gain resulted from a decade of reforestation.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ປ່າເພີ່ມຂຶ້ນ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่าที่เพิ่มขึ้น

definition: The overall change in forest area, gain minus loss
exampleSentence: Net forest change was positive this year.
laoTranslation: ການປ່ຽນແປງປ່າໄມ້ສຸດທິ
thaiTranslation: การเปลี่ยนแปลงพื้นที่ป่าสุทธิ

definition: The number of trees within a given area
exampleSentence: Tree density is higher in the untouched valley.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມໜາແໜ້ນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ความหนาแน่นของต้นไม้

definition: A group of trees all of the same age
exampleSentence: The plantation is an even-aged stand of pine.
laoTranslation: ປ່າອາຍຸເທົ່າກັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้อายุเสมอกัน

definition: A forest area with trees of different ages
exampleSentence: Old-growth forests are usually uneven-aged stands.
laoTranslation: ປ່າອາຍຸບໍ່ເທົ່າກັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้อายุไม่เสมอกัน

definition: The natural change in forest composition over time
exampleSentence: Forest succession follows a wildfire.
laoTranslation: ການສືບຕໍ່ຂອງປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การทดแทนของป่าไม้

definition: The first species to grow in a disturbed area
exampleSentence: Pioneer species colonize land after a fire.
laoTranslation: ຊະນິດພັນບຸກເບີກ
thaiTranslation: ชนิดพันธุ์บุกเบิก

exampleSentence: The climax forest has grown undisturbed for centuries.
laoTranslation: ປ່າຂັ້ນສູງສຸດ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไคลแมกซ์

definition: How forests change when trees fall and create openings
exampleSentence: Gap dynamics allow new trees to grow.
laoTranslation: ພະລວັດຊ່ອງຫວ່າງປ່າ
thaiTranslation: พลวัตช่องว่างในป่า

definition: An opening in the forest canopy
exampleSentence: Sunlight reaches the ground through the canopy gap.
laoTranslation: ຊ່ອງຫວ່າງເຮືອນຍອດ
thaiTranslation: ช่องว่างในเรือนยอด

definition: The boundary between forest and open land
exampleSentence: Wildlife often gathers at the forest edge.

definition: Ecological changes that occur at habitat boundaries
exampleSentence: The edge effect changes plant growth near clearings.
laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบขอบพื้นที่

definition: The area of forest away from its edges
exampleSentence: Rare species are found in the forest interior.
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ตอนในของป่า

definition: The central, undisturbed part of a habitat
exampleSentence: Core habitat is essential for shy wildlife.
laoTranslation: ແຫລ່ງທີ່ຢູ່ອາໄສຫລັກ
thaiTranslation: ถิ่นที่อยู่หลัก

definition: The defined edge of a piece of land
exampleSentence: The land parcel boundary was marked with stones.
laoTranslation: ຂອບເຂດຕອນດິນ
thaiTranslation: แนวเขตแปลงที่ดิน

definition: A physical sign showing a land boundary
exampleSentence: A boundary marker showed where the reserve began.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງໝາຍຂອບເຂດ
thaiTranslation: หมุดหมายเขตแดน

definition: The process of settling a disagreement over land
exampleSentence: Land dispute resolution took several months.
laoTranslation: ການແກ້ໄຂຂໍ້ຂັດແຍ້ງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การแก้ไขข้อพิพาทที่ดิน

exampleSentence: Customary tenure governs much of the village's land.
laoTranslation: ການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນຕາມປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: การถือครองที่ดินตามจารีตประเพณี

exampleSentence: Formal tenure gives farmers access to bank loans.
laoTranslation: ການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນຢ່າງເປັນທາງການ
thaiTranslation: การถือครองที่ดินอย่างเป็นทางการ

definition: The official recording of land ownership
exampleSentence: Land registration reduces disputes between neighbors.
laoTranslation: ການຈົດທະບຽນທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การจดทะเบียนที่ดิน

exampleSentence: The farmer received a land certificate after the survey.
laoTranslation: ໃບຢັ້ງຢືນທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: โฉนดที่ดิน

definition: An official plan guiding how land will be used
exampleSentence: The land use plan set aside area for a new forest.
laoTranslation: ແຜນການນຳໃຊ້ທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ผังการใช้ที่ดิน

definition: A map showing permitted land uses in an area
exampleSentence: The zoning map restricts building near the river.
laoTranslation: ແຜນທີ່ແບ່ງເຂດ
thaiTranslation: แผนที่การแบ่งเขต

definition: A strip of vegetation protecting land from erosion
exampleSentence: A buffer strip protects the stream from farm runoff.

definition: Vegetation along a riverbank that protects water quality
exampleSentence: The riparian buffer filters pollutants before they reach the river.
laoTranslation: ແຖບກັນຊົນແຄມນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: แนวกันชนริมฝั่งน้ำ

definition: A connected strip of natural habitat
exampleSentence: The green corridor links two forest reserves.
laoTranslation: ທາງເຊື່ອມສີຂຽວ
thaiTranslation: ระเบียงสีเขียว

definition: An organization that protects land for conservation
exampleSentence: The land trust purchased the forest to protect it.
laoTranslation: ອົງການອະນຸລັກທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: องค์กรอนุรักษ์ที่ดิน

definition: A legal agreement limiting land development to protect nature
exampleSentence: The conservation easement prevents logging on the property.
laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ຕົກລົງອະນຸລັກທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงอนุรักษ์ที่ดิน

definition: A forest area legally safeguarded from development
exampleSentence: Hunting is banned in the protected forest area.
laoTranslation: ເຂດປ່າປົກປ້ອງ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่าคุ้มครอง

definition: Land set aside to protect forest resources
exampleSentence: The forest reserve is closed to logging.
Elephants roam freely in the game reserve.
laoTranslation: ເຂດສະຫງວນສັດປ່າ
thaiTranslation: เขตสงวนสัตว์ป่า

definition: A protected area balancing conservation and sustainable use
exampleSentence: The biosphere reserve supports both wildlife and local farms.
laoTranslation: ເຂດສະຫງວນຊີວະມົນທົນ
thaiTranslation: เขตสงวนชีวมณฑล

definition: A location recognized for outstanding natural or cultural value
exampleSentence: The ancient forest became a UNESCO site.
laoTranslation: ແຫລ່ງມໍລະດົກຢູເນສໂກ
thaiTranslation: แหล่งมรดกยูเนสโก

definition: A forest with historical or cultural significance
exampleSentence: The heritage forest is sacred to the local community.
laoTranslation: ປ່າມູນມໍລະດົກ

definition: A forest area protected for spiritual reasons
exampleSentence: Villagers protect the sacred grove from logging.
laoTranslation: ດົງໄມ້ສັກສິດ
thaiTranslation: ป่าศักดิ์สิทธิ์

definition: Traditional community methods of managing forests
exampleSentence: Customary forest management has protected the area for generations.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງປ່າຕາມປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการป่าตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: Forest management shared between government and community
exampleSentence: Joint forest management improved local livelihoods.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງປ່າຮ່ວມ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการป่าร่วมกัน

definition: Forest management involving local communities in decisions
exampleSentence: Participatory forestry gives villagers a voice in logging decisions.
laoTranslation: ປ່າໄມ້ແບບມີສ່ວນຮ່ວມ
thaiTranslation: การป่าไม้แบบมีส่วนร่วม

definition: A way of earning a living from forest resources
exampleSentence: Forest livelihood includes gathering fruit and honey.
laoTranslation: ການດຳລົງຊີບຈາກປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การดำรงชีพจากป่า

definition: An economy relying heavily on forest products
exampleSentence: The forest-based economy supports many rural families.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະກິດອີງໃສ່ປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐกิจที่พึ่งพาป่าไม้

definition: The business of producing and selling wood products
exampleSentence: The timber industry is a major employer here.
laoTranslation: ອຸດສາຫະກຳໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรมไม้

definition: The business of turning wood into paper products
exampleSentence: The pulp and paper industry uses fast-growing trees.
laoTranslation: ອຸດສາຫະກຳເຍື່ອ ແລະ ເຈ້ຍ
thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรมเยื่อและกระดาษ

definition: A facility that turns raw timber into products
exampleSentence: The wood processing plant employs two hundred workers.
laoTranslation: ໂຮງງານປຸງແຕ່ງໄມ້
thaiTranslation: โรงงานแปรรูปไม้

definition: Wood sold to buyers in other countries
exampleSentence: Export timber must meet strict quality standards.
laoTranslation: ໄມ້ສົ່ງອອກ

definition: The market for wood products within a country
exampleSentence: The domestic timber market grew alongside construction.
laoTranslation: ຕະຫລາດໄມ້ພາຍໃນ
thaiTranslation: ตลาดไม้ในประเทศ

definition: Verification that forest products meet sustainability standards
exampleSentence: Forest product certification opened new export markets.
laoTranslation: ໃບຢັ້ງຢືນຜະລິດຕະພັນປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบรับรองผลิตภัณฑ์ป่าไม้

definition: A goal of balancing land degradation with restoration
exampleSentence: The country committed to land degradation neutrality.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມເປັນກາງດ້ານຄວາມເສື່ອມໂຊມທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ความเป็นกลางทางความเสื่อมโทรมของที่ดิน

definition: Practices protecting soil and water resources together
exampleSentence: Terracing supports soil and water conservation.
laoTranslation: ການອະນຸລັກດິນ ແລະ ນ້ຳ
thaiTranslation: การอนุรักษ์ดินและน้ำ

definition: The study of how forests affect water systems
exampleSentence: Forest hydrology explains why deforestation increases flooding.
laoTranslation: ອຸທົກກະສາດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อุทกวิทยาป่าไม้

definition: Rainfall captured by tree leaves before reaching the ground
exampleSentence: Canopy interception reduces soil erosion during storms.
laoTranslation: ການດັກນ້ຳຝົນຂອງເຮືອນຍອດ
thaiTranslation: การดักน้ำฝนของเรือนยอด

definition: The local climate created within a forest
exampleSentence: The forest microclimate stays cooler than open land.
laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດຈຸນລະພາກໃນປ່າ
thaiTranslation: จุลภูมิอากาศในป่า

definition: Describing forest that has existed undisturbed for a long time
exampleSentence: The old forest holds trees centuries old.
laoTranslation: ປ່າເກົ່າແກ່
thaiTranslation: ป่าเก่าแก่

definition: Describing recently grown or replanted forest
exampleSentence: The young forest is still recovering from the fire.
thaiTranslation: ป่าอายุน้อย

definition: A forest with both broadleaf and coniferous trees
exampleSentence: The mixed forest has both pine and oak trees.

definition: A forest area consisting of a single tree species
exampleSentence: The plantation is a pure stand of teak.
laoTranslation: ປ່າຊະນິດພັນດຽວ
thaiTranslation: ป่าไม้ชนิดพันธุ์เดียว

definition: A forest containing many different tree species
exampleSentence: A multi-species forest supports more wildlife.
laoTranslation: ປ່າຫລາຍຊະນິດພັນ
thaiTranslation: ป่าหลายชนิดพันธุ์

definition: A landscape of forest fragments mixed with other land uses
exampleSentence: Farming has created a forest patchwork across the valley.
laoTranslation: ພູມທັດປ່າແບບປະສົມ
thaiTranslation: ภูมิทัศน์ป่าแบบปะติดปะต่อ

definition: A measure of how broken up land parcels are
exampleSentence: The land fragmentation index rose as farms were divided.
laoTranslation: ດັດຊະນີການແບ່ງແຍກທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ดัชนีการแบ่งย่อยที่ดิน

exampleSentence: Tree species identification is a key forestry skill.
laoTranslation: ການລະບຸຊະນິດພັນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การระบุชนิดพันธุ์ไม้

definition: The scientific study of trees and woody plants
exampleSentence: She studies dendrology at the forestry college.
laoTranslation: ວິຊາຕົ້ນໄມ້ສາດ

definition: A small marked area used to measure forest data
exampleSentence: Researchers measured trees in each forest inventory plot.
laoTranslation: ແປງສຳຫລວດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แปลงสำรวจป่าไม้

definition: A standard measurement of tree trunk size
exampleSentence: Diameter at breast height helps estimate a tree's age.
laoTranslation: ຂະໜາດເສັ້ນຜ່າສູນກາງລະດັບເອິກ
thaiTranslation: เส้นผ่านศูนย์กลางระดับอก

definition: Determining how tall a tree is
exampleSentence: Tree height measurement uses a special tool called a clinometer.
laoTranslation: ການວັດຄວາມສູງຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การวัดความสูงต้นไม้

definition: A tool used to measure the height of trees
exampleSentence: The forester used a clinometer to measure the pine.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງວັດມູມ
thaiTranslation: เครื่องวัดมุมเงย

definition: A tool used to sample tree rings without harming the tree
exampleSentence: The increment borer revealed the tree's age.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງເຈາະວັດອາຍຸໄມ້
thaiTranslation: สว่านเจาะวัดอายุไม้

definition: A measure of how much ground is covered by tree trunks
exampleSentence: Basal area helps estimate a forest's timber volume.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ຖານຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่หน้าตัดลำต้น

definition: The amount of usable wood in a forest area
exampleSentence: The timber volume was calculated before the sale.
laoTranslation: ປະລິມານໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ปริมาตรไม้

definition: Wood suitable for sale as lumber
exampleSentence: Only merchantable timber was marked for cutting.
laoTranslation: ໄມ້ທີ່ຂາຍໄດ້
thaiTranslation: ไม้ที่สามารถขายได้

definition: The market value of standing timber
exampleSentence: The stumpage value determines the price paid to landowners.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າໄມ້ຢືນຕົ້ນ
thaiTranslation: มูลค่าไม้ยืนต้น

definition: The study of the financial aspects of forestry
exampleSentence: Forest economics guides decisions about harvest timing.
laoTranslation: ເສດຖະສາດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เศรษฐศาสตร์ป่าไม้

definition: The amount of timber that can be cut without depleting the forest
exampleSentence: The sustainable harvest level was set by forestry officials.
laoTranslation: ລະດັບການເກັບກ່ຽວແບບຍືນຍົງ
thaiTranslation: ระดับการเก็บเกี่ยวแบบยั่งยืน

definition: The planned interval between timber harvests
exampleSentence: The harvest rotation for pine is about twenty-five years.
laoTranslation: ຮອບການເກັບກ່ຽວ
thaiTranslation: รอบการเก็บเกี่ยว

definition: A method used to manage forest growth
exampleSentence: Thinning is a common silvicultural practice.
laoTranslation: ວິທີປະຕິບັດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แนวปฏิบัติทางวนวิทยา

definition: The natural or planted regrowth of a forest
exampleSentence: Natural regeneration followed the controlled burn.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູຕາມທຳມະຊາດ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นตัวตามธรรมชาติ

exampleSentence: Natural regeneration restored the burned hillside.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູປ່າຕາມທຳມະຊາດ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูป่าตามธรรมชาติ

exampleSentence: Artificial regeneration was used after the clear-cut.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູປ່າໂດຍການປູກ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูป่าโดยการปลูก

definition: Planting a forest by scattering seed directly
exampleSentence: Direct seeding is cheaper than planting saplings.
laoTranslation: ການຫວ່ານແກ່ນໂດຍກົງ
thaiTranslation: การหว่านเมล็ดโดยตรง

definition: The distance left between planted trees
exampleSentence: Proper tree spacing allows healthy growth.
laoTranslation: ໄລຍະຫ່າງລະຫວ່າງຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ระยะห่างระหว่างต้นไม้

definition: The number of trees planted per area
exampleSentence: Plantation density affects how quickly trees grow.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມໜາແໜ້ນສວນປູກ
thaiTranslation: ความหนาแน่นของสวนป่า

definition: How quickly a tree increases in size
exampleSentence: Fast tree growth rate makes eucalyptus popular for plantations.
laoTranslation: ອັດຕາການເຕີບໂຕຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อัตราการเติบโตของต้นไม้

definition: The average yearly growth of a tree or stand
exampleSentence: Mean annual increment helps plan harvest timing.
laoTranslation: ອັດຕາການເຕີບໂຕສະເລ່ຍປະຈຳປີ
thaiTranslation: อัตราการเติบโตเฉลี่ยต่อปี

definition: How efficiently a forest produces usable wood
exampleSentence: Fertile soil increases forest productivity.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพของป่าไม้

definition: A measure of how well land supports tree growth
exampleSentence: Site quality varies across the plantation.
laoTranslation: ຄຸນນະພາບພື້ນທີ່
thaiTranslation: คุณภาพพื้นที่

definition: The suitability of land for a particular use
exampleSentence: Land capability assessments guide farming and forestry decisions.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມສາມາດຂອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ศักยภาพของที่ดิน

definition: How well land matches a particular purpose
exampleSentence: Land suitability studies preceded the new plantation.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມເໝາະສົມຂອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ความเหมาะสมของที่ดิน

definition: The overall condition of a forest ecosystem
exampleSentence: Regular monitoring protects forest health.
laoTranslation: ສຸຂະພາບປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: สุขภาพของป่า

exampleSentence: Tree disease spread quickly through the plantation.
laoTranslation: ພະຍາດຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: โรคของต้นไม้

definition: An insect or animal harmful to trees
exampleSentence: The beetle is a common tree pest.
laoTranslation: ສັດຕູຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ศัตรูของต้นไม้

definition: An insect that damages trees by boring into bark
exampleSentence: Bark beetles killed many pine trees.

definition: A non-native tree that spreads and harms an ecosystem
exampleSentence: The invasive tree species crowded out native plants.

thaiTranslation: ชนิดพันธุ์ต้นไม้รุกราน

definition: The death rate of trees in a forest
exampleSentence: Tree mortality rose during the drought.

definition: Evaluating harm caused to a forest by a storm
exampleSentence: The storm damage assessment took two weeks.

definition: Trees uprooted or broken by strong wind

thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ที่ถูกลมพัดโค่น

definition: A standing dead tree, often left for wildlife
exampleSentence: The snag provides a nesting site for woodpeckers.

definition: Fallen logs and branches on the forest floor

thaiTranslation: เศษไม้ขนาดใหญ่ในป่า

definition: Dead leaves and plant material on the forest floor
exampleSentence: Forest litter decomposes to enrich the soil.

definition: The layer of decomposed organic material in soil
exampleSentence: A thick humus layer supports healthy tree growth.

thaiTranslation: ชั้นฮิวมัส

definition: Soil found within a forest ecosystem
exampleSentence: Forest soil is often rich in organic matter.

definition: The capacity of land to produce crops or timber
exampleSentence: Land productivity declines with severe erosion.
laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຕະພາບທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพของที่ดิน

definition: Overseeing the growth and harvest of planted trees
exampleSentence: Tree plantation management includes regular pruning.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງສວນປູກຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การจัดการสวนป่า

definition: Forest land or timber viewed as a financial resource
exampleSentence: The forest asset was valued before the sale.
laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນປ່າໄມ້

definition: Investing money in forest land for future profit
exampleSentence: Timberland investment appealed to long-term investors.

definition: An assessment of the value of a piece of land
exampleSentence: The land appraisal set the sale price for the farm.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນລາຄາທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การประเมินราคาที่ดิน

definition: The monetary worth of a piece of land
exampleSentence: Land value rose near the new road.
laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າທີ່ດິນ

definition: A traditionally recognized edge of community land
exampleSentence: The customary boundary was respected by neighboring villages.

thaiTranslation: เขตแดนตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: A road built to reach forest areas
exampleSentence: The forest access road was damaged by the flood.

thaiTranslation: ถนนเข้าพื้นที่ป่า

definition: A forest region far from towns or roads
exampleSentence: The remote forest area is rarely visited.

thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่าห่างไกล

definition: A large area of undisturbed natural forest
exampleSentence: The frontier forest remains largely untouched by logging.
thaiTranslation: ป่าชายแดนที่ยังไม่ถูกรบกวน

definition: Government rules guiding forest use and protection
exampleSentence: New forest policy limits logging near rivers.
laoTranslation: ນະໂຍບາຍປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: นโยบายป่าไม้

definition: Legislation governing the use of forests
exampleSentence: Forest law requires permits for commercial logging.

definition: Government rules about how land can be used
exampleSentence: Land use policy protects farmland from development.

definition: The management of land records and rights
exampleSentence: Land administration ensures accurate ownership records.
laoTranslation: ການບໍລິຫານທີ່ດິນ

definition: An official register of land ownership and boundaries
exampleSentence: The national cadastre records every land parcel.
laoTranslation: ທະບຽນທີ່ດິນ

definition: A digital system for managing land data
exampleSentence: The land information system helps resolve disputes quickly.

thaiTranslation: ระบบข้อมูลที่ดิน

definition: A government agency managing forest resources
exampleSentence: The forest department issued new logging permits.

definition: A government department overseeing farming policy
exampleSentence: The ministry of agriculture announced new subsidies.
laoTranslation: ກະຊວງກະສິກຳ
thaiTranslation: กระทรวงเกษตร

definition: A government department overseeing forest management
exampleSentence: The ministry of forestry approved the reforestation plan.
laoTranslation: ກະຊວງປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: กระทรวงป่าไม้

definition: A government body overseeing land matters
exampleSentence: The land commission reviewed the boundary dispute.
laoTranslation: ຄະນະກຳມະການທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: คณะกรรมการที่ดิน

definition: A government official responsible for forest oversight
exampleSentence: The forestry officer inspected the logging site.
laoTranslation: ພະນັກງານປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เจ้าหน้าที่ป่าไม้

definition: A government official who manages land records
exampleSentence: The land officer processed the new title deed.
laoTranslation: ພະນັກງານທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: เจ้าหน้าที่ที่ดิน

definition: Managing resources with active involvement of local people
exampleSentence: Community-based natural resource management empowers villagers.

definition: A group of people who share access to a resource

definition: The legal right to use forest resources

exampleSentence: Usufruct rights let farmers use state land for grazing.

definition: A disagreement over land ownership or use
exampleSentence: The land conflict was settled through mediation.

definition: A process of resolving a dispute with a neutral party
exampleSentence: Mediation helped settle the boundary dispute peacefully.

definition: The unfair or illegal acquisition of land

definition: Moving people to a new area, often due to land use change
exampleSentence: Resettlement was necessary after the dam was built.

definition: The forced movement of people from their homes
exampleSentence: Deforestation caused the displacement of local wildlife.

definition: Land traditionally owned by native communities
exampleSentence: Indigenous land rights are protected under the new law.

definition: Land historically owned by a family or community
exampleSentence: The ancestral land has been farmed for generations.

definition: Land traditionally used and managed by a tribe
exampleSentence: Tribal land is governed by traditional customs.
laoTranslation: ທີ່ດິນຊົນເຜົ່າ

definition: A person responsible for protecting land on behalf of others
exampleSentence: The village elder acts as land custodian.
laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນ

definition: A person or group responsible for protecting a forest
exampleSentence: The community serves as forest custodian for the reserve.

definition: A person who has become wealthy through the timber trade
exampleSentence: The timber tycoon owns vast tracts of forest.
thaiTranslation: เจ้าพ่อธุรกิจไม้

definition: A business that harvests and sells timber
exampleSentence: The logging company received approval for the new site.
laoTranslation: ບໍລິສັດຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: บริษัทตัดไม้

definition: A company hired to carry out forestry work
exampleSentence: The forestry contractor cleared the fire-damaged trees.

definition: A person or company that builds on undeveloped land
exampleSentence: The land developer wanted to clear the forest for housing.

definition: Building new housing or commercial property on land

definition: The growth of a city into surrounding land

definition: Land on the edge between city and countryside
exampleSentence: Peri-urban areas often face rapid land use change.

definition: Buying land in hopes its value will rise
exampleSentence: Land speculation drove up prices near the new highway.

thaiTranslation: การเก็งกำไรที่ดิน

definition: Holding land for future development or profit
exampleSentence: The company practiced land banking near the growing town.

definition: Previously developed land, often contaminated, awaiting reuse
exampleSentence: The brownfield land was cleaned up before construction.

definition: Undeveloped land, often agricultural or natural
exampleSentence: Building on greenfield land reduces available farmland.

definition: An effort to restore or create usable land
exampleSentence: The land reclamation project turned the quarry into parkland.

definition: Restoring land damaged by mining activities

definition: A large surface mine dug into the land

laoTranslation: ບໍ່ແຮ່ເປີດ
thaiTranslation: เหมืองเปิด

definition: A place where stone or minerals are dug from the ground
exampleSentence: The quarry supplies stone for local construction.

definition: The gradual sinking of land, often from resource extraction
exampleSentence: Land subsidence damaged buildings near the old mine.

definition: The compressing of soil, reducing its ability to absorb water
exampleSentence: Heavy machinery causes soil compaction in farm fields.

definition: Restoring degraded land to a productive state
exampleSentence: Land rehabilitation returned the mine site to forest.
laoTranslation: ການບູລະນະທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูที่ดิน

definition: Restoring a damaged watershed to protect water resources
exampleSentence: Watershed rehabilitation reduced flooding downstream.

definition: Coordinated planning across different land uses
exampleSentence: Integrated land management balances farming and forest protection.

thaiTranslation: การจัดการที่ดินแบบบูรณาการ

definition: Land managed for more than one purpose
exampleSentence: The multi-use land supports both grazing and forestry.

definition: A disagreement between different intended uses of land
exampleSentence: Land use conflict arose between farmers and loggers.

definition: Officially dividing land into designated use categories
exampleSentence: Land use zoning separates residential and industrial areas.

definition: Large-scale efforts to restore degraded forest landscapes
exampleSentence: Forest landscape restoration combines tree planting and community support.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູພູມທັດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูภูมิทัศน์ป่าไม้

definition: Trees or branches that have fallen naturally
exampleSentence: Deadfall blocked the hiking trail after the storm.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ລົ້ມ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ที่ล้มตามธรรมชาติ

exampleSentence: The windfall provided free firewood for the village.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ລົ້ມຍ້ອນລົມ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ที่ล้มเพราะลม

definition: Official permission required to cut down a tree
exampleSentence: A tree felling permit is needed for large trees.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດໂຄ່ນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตโค่นต้นไม้

definition: Official approval to gather timber or crops
exampleSentence: The harvest permit specified which trees could be cut.

thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตเก็บเกี่ยว

definition: Legal authorization to cut trees commercially
exampleSentence: The logging permit expired at the end of the year.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตตัดไม้

definition: Official approval required before certain land activities
exampleSentence: An environmental permit was required before clearing the site.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตด้านสิ่งแวดล้อม

definition: Official approval to remove vegetation from land
exampleSentence: A land clearance permit was denied due to erosion risk.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດແຜ້ວຖາງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตถางที่ดิน

definition: Regular monitoring of a forest by rangers
exampleSentence: The forest ranger patrol checks for illegal activity daily.
laoTranslation: ການລາດຕະເວນຂອງເຈົ້າໜ້າທີ່ປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การลาดตระเวนของเจ้าหน้าที่พิทักษ์ป่า

definition: A team dedicated to stopping illegal hunting
exampleSentence: The anti-poaching unit patrols the reserve at night.
laoTranslation: ໜ່ວຍຕ້ານການລ່າສັດຜິດກົດໝາຍ

definition: Tracking the health and numbers of wild animals
exampleSentence: Wildlife monitoring uses camera traps in the forest.
laoTranslation: ການເຝົ້າລະວັງສັດປ່າ

definition: A hidden camera used to photograph wildlife
exampleSentence: The camera trap captured images of a rare leopard.
