definition: A tracking device attached to wild animals
exampleSentence: Researchers fitted the elephant with a GPS collar.
laoTranslation: ປອກຄໍຕິດຕາມ GPS
thaiTranslation: ปลอกคอติดตาม GPS

definition: Marking animals for tracking and study
exampleSentence: Tagging helps scientists study migration patterns.
laoTranslation: ການຕິດປ້າຍຕິດຕາມ
thaiTranslation: การติดแท็กติดตาม

definition: A count of trees or wildlife in a forest
exampleSentence: The forest census recorded over a hundred species.
laoTranslation: ການສຳຫລວດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การสำรวจสำมะโนป่าไม้

definition: A study assessing the variety of species in an area
exampleSentence: The biodiversity survey identified several rare plants.
laoTranslation: ການສຳຫລວດຄວາມຫລາກຫລາຍທາງຊີວະພາບ
thaiTranslation: การสำรวจความหลากหลายทางชีวภาพ

definition: A recorded list of species found in an area
exampleSentence: The species inventory took a full year to complete.
laoTranslation: ບັນຊີຊະນິດພັນ
thaiTranslation: บัญชีชนิดพันธุ์

definition: An assessment of the condition of a habitat
exampleSentence: The habitat survey guided the reserve's management plan.
laoTranslation: ການສຳຫລວດແຫລ່ງທີ່ຢູ່ອາໄສ
thaiTranslation: การสำรวจถิ่นที่อยู่อาศัย

definition: An evaluation of the condition of land resources
exampleSentence: The land health assessment revealed signs of erosion.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນສຸຂະພາບທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การประเมินสุขภาพที่ดิน

definition: Managing land to preserve its productivity long-term
exampleSentence: Sustainable land management protects the region's water supply.
laoTranslation: ການຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນແບບຍືນຍົງ
thaiTranslation: การจัดการที่ดินอย่างยั่งยืน

definition: Evaluating the extent of harm done to land
exampleSentence: The land degradation assessment guided restoration priorities.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນຄວາມເສື່ອມໂຊມທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การประเมินความเสื่อมโทรมของที่ดิน

definition: The likelihood of a wildfire occurring
exampleSentence: Forest fire risk rises sharply in the dry season.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມສ່ຽງໄຟປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ความเสี่ยงไฟป่า

definition: An official measure of wildfire risk
exampleSentence: The fire danger rating reached its highest level today.
laoTranslation: ລະດັບຄວາມສ່ຽງໄຟໄໝ້
thaiTranslation: ระดับความเสี่ยงไฟป่า

definition: The period when wildfires are most likely
exampleSentence: Fire season begins as the dry weather sets in.

definition: Reduced visibility caused by fire smoke
exampleSentence: Smoke haze from wildfires covered the valley.
thaiTranslation: หมอกควันจากไฟไหม้

definition: Land visibly damaged by a past fire
exampleSentence: The burn scar is slowly regrowing with new plants.
thaiTranslation: รอยแผลเป็นจากไฟไหม้

definition: The natural regrowth of an area after a fire
exampleSentence: Post-fire recovery takes several years in this forest.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູຫລັງໄຟໄໝ້
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นตัวหลังไฟไหม้

definition: Harvesting timber from trees damaged by fire or storm
exampleSentence: Salvage logging followed the wildfire.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບໄມ້ຫລັງໄພພິບັດ
thaiTranslation: การเก็บไม้หลังภัยพิบัติ

definition: Recovering usable wood from damaged trees
exampleSentence: Timber salvage reduced waste after the storm.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບໄມ້ຫລັງໄພພິບັດ
thaiTranslation: การเก็บไม้กู้คืนหลังภัยพิบัติ

definition: A strategy for restoring a damaged forest
exampleSentence: The forest recovery plan included new tree planting.
laoTranslation: ແຜນຟື້ນຟູປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แผนฟื้นฟูป่าไม้

definition: The process of restoring damaged land
exampleSentence: Land recovery after mining takes many years.
laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูที่ดิน

definition: The gradual change of an ecosystem over time
exampleSentence: Ecological succession follows a forest fire.
laoTranslation: ການສືບຕໍ່ທາງນິເວດ
thaiTranslation: การทดแทนทางนิเวศ

definition: The stable plant community reached after succession
exampleSentence: Climax vegetation returned decades after the disturbance.
laoTranslation: ພືດພັນຂັ້ນສູງສຸດ
thaiTranslation: พืชพรรณไคลแมกซ์

definition: An event that disrupts a forest's natural state
exampleSentence: Storms are a common forest disturbance in this region.
laoTranslation: ການລົບກວນປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การรบกวนป่าไม้

definition: The typical pattern of natural events shaping an ecosystem
exampleSentence: Fire is part of the natural disturbance regime here.
laoTranslation: ຮູບແບບການລົບກວນທຳມະຊາດ
thaiTranslation: รูปแบบการรบกวนตามธรรมชาติ

definition: Confidence in one's legal right to use land
exampleSentence: Land tenure security encourages farmers to invest in their soil.
laoTranslation: ຄວາມໝັ້ນຄົງໃນການຄອບຄອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: ความมั่นคงในการถือครองที่ดิน

definition: A traditional sign showing where community land ends
exampleSentence: A large stone served as the customary boundary marker.
laoTranslation: ເຄື່ອງໝາຍຂອບເຂດປະເພນີ
thaiTranslation: หมุดหมายเขตแดนตามจารีตประเพณี

definition: The defined edge of a logging concession area
exampleSentence: The forest concession boundary was clearly marked with signs.
laoTranslation: ຂອບເຂດສຳປະທານປ່າ
thaiTranslation: แนวเขตสัมปทานป่าไม้

definition: A detailed schedule for cutting trees sustainably
exampleSentence: The timber harvest plan spans the next ten years.
laoTranslation: ແຜນການເກັບກ່ຽວໄມ້
thaiTranslation: แผนการเก็บเกี่ยวไม้

definition: A steady, long-term source of harvestable wood
exampleSentence: Replanting ensures a sustainable timber supply.
laoTranslation: ການສະໜອງໄມ້ແບບຍືນຍົງ
thaiTranslation: อุปทานไม้แบบยั่งยืน

definition: Data showing expected timber production over time
exampleSentence: Foresters use a yield table to plan harvests.
laoTranslation: ຕາຕະລາງຜົນຜະລິດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ตารางผลผลิตป่าไม้

definition: An organization that verifies sustainable timber practices
exampleSentence: The timber certification body inspected the plantation.
laoTranslation: ອົງການຢັ້ງຢືນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: หน่วยงานรับรองไม้

exampleSentence: The forest area shrank due to farming expansion.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ປ່າ
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ป่า

exampleSentence: The wooded area provides shade for hikers.
laoTranslation: ພື້ນທີ່ປົກຄຸມດ້ວຍຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: พื้นที่ปกคลุมด้วยต้นไม้

definition: A designated region defined by forest type or use
exampleSentence: The protected forest zone borders the river.
Tree cutting near the river was restricted.
laoTranslation: ການຕັດຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การตัดต้นไม้

definition: The act of taking out trees from an area
exampleSentence: Tree removal made way for the new road.
laoTranslation: ການເອົາຕົ້ນໄມ້ອອກ
thaiTranslation: การกำจัดต้นไม้

definition: A small isolated area of forest
exampleSentence: A forest patch remained after the surrounding land was cleared.
thaiTranslation: ผืนป่าที่แยกตัว

definition: The area of a piece of land
exampleSentence: Land parcel size determines how it can be used.
laoTranslation: ຂະໜາດຕອນດິນ
thaiTranslation: ขนาดแปลงที่ดิน

definition: The grade or condition of harvested wood
exampleSentence: Timber quality affects the price paid to loggers.
laoTranslation: ຄຸນນະພາບໄມ້

definition: The condition and grade of processed wood
exampleSentence: Wood quality is checked before it leaves the mill.
laoTranslation: ຄຸນນະພາບໄມ້

definition: The number of years a tree has been growing
exampleSentence: The tree's age was estimated from its rings.
laoTranslation: ອາຍຸຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อายุต้นไม้

definition: How long a tree typically lives
exampleSentence: A teak tree's lifespan can exceed a century.
laoTranslation: ອາຍຸຂັຍຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อายุขัยของต้นไม้

definition: The distribution of tree ages within a forest
exampleSentence: A varied forest age structure supports more wildlife.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງສ້າງອາຍຸປ່າ
thaiTranslation: โครงสร้างอายุของป่า

definition: A classification of forest based on its tree species
exampleSentence: Tropical forest is one common forest type here.
laoTranslation: ປະເພດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ประเภทของป่า

definition: Machinery used to cut and move timber
exampleSentence: Logging equipment was inspected before the season began.
laoTranslation: ອຸປະກອນຕັດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อุปกรณ์ตัดไม้

definition: Official permission to enter a restricted forest area
exampleSentence: Researchers obtained a forest access permit for their study.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດເຂົ້າປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตเข้าพื้นที่ป่า

definition: A facility for studying forest ecosystems
exampleSentence: The forest research station tracks tree growth rates.
laoTranslation: ສະຖານີຄົ້ນຄວ້າປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: สถานีวิจัยป่าไม้

definition: Evaluating the quantity and quality of standing timber
exampleSentence: The timber assessment guided the harvest plan.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນປະລິມານໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การประเมินปริมาณไม้

definition: Estimating the financial worth of a forest
exampleSentence: Forest valuation considers both timber and ecosystem services.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນມູນຄ່າປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การประเมินมูลค่าป่าไม้

definition: Assessing the monetary worth of land
exampleSentence: Land valuation determined the compensation amount.
laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນມູນຄ່າທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: การประเมินมูลค่าที่ดิน

definition: Sorting cut wood by quality and size
exampleSentence: Timber grading affects the price paid to loggers.
laoTranslation: ການຈັດເກຣດໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การคัดเกรดไม้

definition: Classifying logs by size and quality before sale
exampleSentence: Log grading takes place at the sawmill entrance.
laoTranslation: ການຈັດເກຣດທ່ອນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การคัดเกรดไม้ท่อน

definition: An official responsible for protecting forest resources
exampleSentence: The forest conservation officer reported the illegal clearing.
laoTranslation: ພະນັກງານອະນຸລັກປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: เจ้าหน้าที่อนุรักษ์ป่าไม้

definition: An official responsible for overseeing land use
exampleSentence: The land management officer approved the new zoning plan.
laoTranslation: ພະນັກງານຄຸ້ມຄອງທີ່ດິນ
thaiTranslation: เจ้าหน้าที่จัดการที่ดิน

definition: An organized effort to replant trees in a cleared area
exampleSentence: The reforestation project restored the hillside within a decade.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງການປູກປ່າຄືນ
thaiTranslation: โครงการปลูกป่าทดแทน

definition: An initiative providing free trees for planting
exampleSentence: The tree donation program gave saplings to local schools.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງການບໍລິຈາກຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: โครงการบริจาคต้นไม้

definition: A tree-planting activity organized by a school
exampleSentence: School tree planting is an annual environmental event.
laoTranslation: ການປູກຕົ້ນໄມ້ໂຮງຮຽນ
thaiTranslation: การปลูกต้นไม้ของโรงเรียน

definition: A group of people who freely help protect forests
exampleSentence: The forest volunteer group cleared invasive plants.
laoTranslation: ກຸ່ມອາສາສະໝັກປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: กลุ่มอาสาสมัครป่าไม้

definition: Official approval required to export wood products
exampleSentence: A timber export permit is required for shipment abroad.
laoTranslation: ໃບອະນຸຍາດສົ່ງອອກໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ใบอนุญาตส่งออกไม้

definition: The sale of wood products to other countries
exampleSentence: Wood export earns valuable foreign income.
laoTranslation: ການສົ່ງອອກໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การส่งออกไม้

definition: Tourism centered on visiting and enjoying forests
exampleSentence: Forest tourism has grown alongside eco-friendly travel.
laoTranslation: ການທ່ອງທ່ຽວປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การท่องเที่ยวเชิงป่าไม้

definition: An elevated walkway allowing visitors to see the forest canopy
exampleSentence: Tourists enjoyed the canopy walk above the treetops.
laoTranslation: ທາງຍ່າງເທິງເຮືອນຍອດ
thaiTranslation: ทางเดินชมเรือนยอด

definition: The activity of climbing trees, for recreation or study
exampleSentence: Researchers use tree climbing to study the canopy.
laoTranslation: ການປີນຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การปีนต้นไม้

definition: A group that measures and records forest conditions
exampleSentence: The forest survey team mapped tree density across the reserve.
laoTranslation: ທີມສຳຫລວດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ทีมสำรวจป่าไม้

definition: The amount of carbon stored within a forest
exampleSentence: The forest carbon stock was measured for the climate project.
laoTranslation: ຄາບອນສະສົມໃນປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ปริมาณคาร์บอนสะสมในป่า

definition: The carbon held within a tree's wood and roots
exampleSentence: Older trees hold more tree carbon storage than saplings.
laoTranslation: ການເກັບຮັກສາຄາບອນຂອງຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การกักเก็บคาร์บอนของต้นไม้

definition: A team trained to fight forest fires
exampleSentence: The forest fire brigade responded within the hour.
laoTranslation: ໜ່ວຍດັບໄຟປ່າ
thaiTranslation: หน่วยดับไฟป่า

definition: A person or system monitoring for signs of fire
exampleSentence: The fire watch spotted smoke early in the dry season.
laoTranslation: ການເຝົ້າລະວັງໄຟ
thaiTranslation: การเฝ้าระวังไฟป่า

definition: The legal rights governing forest ownership and use
exampleSentence: Clear forest tenure encourages sustainable management.
laoTranslation: ການຄອບຄອງປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: การถือครองป่าไม้

definition: A government program supporting local forest management
exampleSentence: The community forestry program trained village rangers.
laoTranslation: ໂຄງການປ່າໄມ້ຊຸມຊົນ
thaiTranslation: โครงการป่าไม้ชุมชน

definition: A group of forest users working together
exampleSentence: The forestry cooperative shares income from sustainable logging.
laoTranslation: ສະຫະກອນປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: สหกรณ์ป่าไม้

exampleSentence: Forest income supplements many rural households.
laoTranslation: ລາຍໄດ້ຈາກປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: รายได้จากป่าไม้

definition: Earnings from forest products other than timber
exampleSentence: Honey and mushrooms provide non-wood forest income.
laoTranslation: ລາຍໄດ້ຈາກປ່າໄມ້ນອກຈາກໄມ້
thaiTranslation: รายได้จากป่าที่ไม่ใช่ไม้

definition: Tools used to measure and study forest characteristics
exampleSentence: The team carried forest survey equipment into the reserve.
laoTranslation: ອຸປະກອນສຳຫລວດປ່າໄມ້
thaiTranslation: อุปกรณ์สำรวจป่าไม้

definition: A disagreement over legal ownership of land
exampleSentence: The land title dispute delayed the construction project.
laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ຂັດແຍ້ງໃບຕາດິນ
thaiTranslation: ข้อพิพาทโฉนดที่ดิน

definition: A disagreement over where a forest's edge lies
exampleSentence: The forest boundary dispute was resolved by a new survey.
laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ຂັດແຍ້ງຂອບເຂດປ່າ
thaiTranslation: ข้อพิพาทแนวเขตป่า

definition: A leisurely stroll through a forest
exampleSentence: We took a forest walk before breakfast.
laoTranslation: ການຍ່າງໃນປ່າ
thaiTranslation: การเดินป่า

exampleSentence: We rested under a shady tree.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ໃຫ້ຮົ່ມ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ให้ร่มเงา

exampleSentence: The tall tree towered over the others.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ສູງ

definition: Leaves that have dropped from trees
exampleSentence: Fallen leaves covered the forest path.
laoTranslation: ໃບໄມ້ຫລົ່ນ

definition: The distinctive scent of a forest
exampleSentence: The forest smell was fresh after the rain.

definition: The sound made by singing birds
exampleSentence: Birdsong filled the quiet forest morning.
laoTranslation: ສຽງນົກຮ້ອງ
thaiTranslation: เสียงนกร้อง

definition: The natural noises heard within a forest
exampleSentence: We listened to the forest sounds at dusk.
thaiTranslation: เสียงในป่า

definition: The shadow cast by a tree
exampleSentence: We sat in the tree shade to cool off.
laoTranslation: ຮົ່ມຕົ້ນໄມ້
thaiTranslation: ร่มเงาต้นไม้

exampleSentence: A leafy tree shaded the courtyard.
laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້ໃບໜາ
thaiTranslation: ต้นไม้ใบดก
